data.body: Investigation: The shim correctly dispatches capture-review-diff.sh. Test: '.claude/scripts/dso capture-review-diff.sh' dispatches to plugins/dso/scripts/capture-review-diff.sh (error is about missing args, not 'command not found'). The script is executable (-rwxr-xr-x). This appears to have been a transient state in worktree-20260412-173956. Cannot reproduce in current worktree. Escalated to user for decision on closure.
